privacy.label: PRIVACY
privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: CPWD.nl is an informational website. We do not store visitor data in a database and we have no user accounts. This policy explains what minimal processing does take place.
privacy.rightsIntro: Even with minimal processing you have rights under the GDPR. Questions? Email info{'@'}cpwd.nl.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about this policy? Email info{'@'}cpwd.nl. CPWD is based in the Netherlands.
privacy.authorityBody: If you disagree with how we handle your request, you may lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl).

encrypt.label: End-to-end flow
encrypt.plain: CPWD does not store visitor data

sections.title: No storage
paragraphs: This website is informational. We do not maintain a database of visitor profiles, accounts or newsletters.
Visits to cpwd.nl are not linked to a personal dossier on our servers.

sections.title: Contact form
paragraphs: If you use our contact form, we send your message directly by email. That data is not stored in a database on this website.
We only keep email correspondence as long as needed to handle your enquiry.

sections.title: Technical logs
paragraphs: Our hosting provider may keep standard server logs (such as IP address and browser type) for security and stability. We do not have direct access to a visitor registry.
These logs fall under our processor agreement with our host and are retained briefly.

sections.title: Cookies
paragraphs: We use functional cookies only, for example for language preference.
No tracking or advertising cookies. You can manage cookies in your browser.

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: This privacy policy may be updated. The current version is always published on this page.
For material changes we update the date at the top.
